query_fields.domain_expertise: Spatial Omics and Kidney Disease Research
query_fields.mechanistic_question: What is the spatiotemporal relationship between proximal tubule loss and fibrosis marker upregulation?

takeaways: The hypothesis should be evaluated through tubulointerstitial injury rather than glomerular damage alone.
Functional proximal tubule loss and extracellular matrix expansion are plausible DKD progression axes.
Fibrosis markers should be tested separately because matrix deposition and myofibroblast activation can diverge.

target_variables.name: proximal_tubule_density
target_variables.method: Proportion of cells annotated as Proximal Tubules per ROI

target_variables.name: collagen_IV_expression
target_variables.method: Mean fluorescence intensity or normalized transcript count of COL4A1 per ROI

target_variables.name: aSMA_expression
target_variables.method: Mean fluorescence intensity or normalized transcript count of ACTA2 per ROI

target_variables.name: pt_hidden_damage_signature
target_variables.method: Mean injury-marker expression subsetted within surviving Proximal Tubule cells

roi_examples.classification: Fibrotic Interstitium with Associated Arteriolar Structure
roi_examples.visual_summary: Concentric aSMA-positive vascular structure with diffuse interstitial Collagen IV/aSMA signal.
roi_examples.omics_summary: 24% VSMC/aSMA enrichment and 36% total immune infiltrate support an active inflammatory fibrotic milieu.

roi_examples.classification: Intact Proximal Tubule Segment with Early Molecular Stress Signatures
roi_examples.visual_summary: Proximal-tubule-like structure with preserved basement membrane and no strong localized aSMA-positive fibrosis.
roi_examples.omics_summary: 80% proximal tubule signature with immune-related markers including C1QC, C3aR, and PD1.

retriever.database: FAISS vector index over interpretation reports
queries: proximal tubule cell loss and fibrosis markers CollagenIV aSMA in DKD
late-stage proximal tubule damage with elevated alpha-SMA and collagen expression
spatial correlation of proximal tubule degradation and interstitial fibrosis in diabetic kidney disease

validator.interpretation: The bundled snapshot supports proximal tubule density loss and Collagen IV increase, but does not support concurrent aSMA upregulation or the proposed late-stage hidden-damage signature.
